title: Create duplicate GND_NET in one cell
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.27 (git sha1 5f88c218b58, gcc 9.3.0 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

```verilog
// test.v
module test(output out0, out1);
sub u1(out0, out1);
endmodule

module sub(output out2, out3);
assign out2 = 0;
endmodule
```
```
yosys -p "read -sv test.v; synth_xilinx -top test -edif out.edf"
```

### Expected Behavior

The generated edf file should not have 2 GND_NET in cell sub.

### Actual Behavior

In out.edf, cell sub, there are 2 GND_NET generated, which is error.

          (net GND_NET (joined
              (portRef out2)
            (portRef G (instanceRef GND))
            )
          )
          (net GND_NET (joined
              (portRef out3)
            (portRef G (instanceRef GND))
            )
          )
